prediction.reasoning: This prediction is generated using a simplified Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model for stock price evolution over 20 trading days. The model assumes an average daily price drift of 0.05% and an annualized volatility that translates to a daily volatility of 1.5%. The point estimate represents the median price derived from this model, while the confidence intervals are calculated based on the assumed volatility and log-normal distribution of returns. It is crucial to understand that this is a theoretical statistical projection and not financial advice. Stock prices are highly unpredictable and influenced by numerous factors not included in this simplified model, such as real-time market news, company performance, economic indicators, and investor sentiment.
